meaning: Oxford Committee for Famine Relief(英国) 牛津饥荒救济委员会
examples: Oxfam has appealed to western nations to do more to help the refugees.
Oxfam has a number of successful fundraising channels.
Unless, that is, you're asking on behalf of Oxfam.
The UN's emergency response plan for Syrian refugees, Oxfam said, currently lacked 75% of the funding required.
Oxfam is to receive the Freedom of Oxford where it was founded 70 years ago.
